text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
It's true! Umastagram has a lot 
of photos of cooking.

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Wow, such fancy food. I can't make 
anything like that…

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Sure you can, Yukino. Taking off on Umasta 
is all about presentation!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
If you add some color to your usual dishes, 
you can make them look like they came right 
from a trendy cafe♪

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
Cafe style! City gals are always 
eat'n stuff like that…!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I'm not sure I'd really have the sense 
to spruce a plate up like that. It seems 
pretty difficult…

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Just leave that to me!♪ I'll make sure 
everything looks as fab as can be!☆

text_block_list.name: Yukino Bijin
text_block_list.text:
I wanna try it out! Why don't the three of us 
make something?

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Yes, by all means! I want to make something 
really cute!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
All righty! And I'll post it on my Umasta page 
when it's done!
